summary: Frontend-only verification of Sub-fase 1.13 polish (UI validation + catch-weight transparency) on Admin > Master Data > Product form. All 6 test scenarios passed; no products/orders were created during testing.

test_1_empty_kgm_hint.exact_text: Isi Gramasi (gsm) & Lebar (meter) untuk mengaktifkan penjualan per "kg" (catch-weight).

test_2_computed_kgm_200x1.5.exact_text: Catch-weight aktif: 1 meter ≈ 0.300 kg (kg/m = gramasi × lebar ÷ 1000) · unit "kg" tersedia di penjualan

test_2b_revert_to_zero.note: Setting gramasi=0 & lebar=0 returns the hint text correctly.

test_4_validation_factor_zero_blocks_sav.exact_text: Konversi #1: faktor harus lebih besar dari 0.

test_5_validation_from_equals_to_blocks_.exact_text: Konversi #1: unit "Dari" dan "Ke" tidak boleh sama.

test_6_cleanup_no_save.note: Conversion row removed via admin-product-conv-remove-0. No products were created (final count still 7).

critical_code_review_comments: validateConversions (AdminView.jsx L55-66) cleanly enforces: required from/to units, factor>0, from!=to. Messages are localized in Indonesian per requirement.
kgPerMeter computed correctly using gramasi×lebar/1000; UI gracefully toggles between hint (gray) and active (green) states via conditional rendering at L201-210.

Minor (non-blocking) UX nit: numeric inputs (gramasi, lebar, price, harga_pokok) use type=text (default) in the map at L199 — they rely on Number() coercion onChange. Works but could use type=number for better mobile UX. Not in scope of 1.13.
seed_data_creation: None. No products, customers, or orders were created during this test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sub-fase 1.13 admin product form polish is fully verified: kg/m transparency info and uom_conversions inline validation work as specified. The 'Tampilkan Form Create' (data-testid: toggle-admin-create-form-button) must be clicked first to reveal the product form — the form is hidden by default on Admin > Product tab. Pre-existing unrelated build warning re: @zxing/browser in WMS scanner files exists but does NOT affect Admin/POS — ignored as instructed.
